rule_metadata.author: NTT Security - Axel Olsson
rule_metadata.title: Suspiciously Short Download URL of Anomalous Style

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspiciously Short Download URL of Anomalous Style
id: e9b0c604-707b-44e2-a87c-fbf390eaf8ef
description: Suspiciously short download URL of anomalous style commonly seen during
  malicious activity.
status: stable
author: NTT Security - Axel Olsson
date: '2022-09-06'
modified: '2023-10-31'
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    c-uri|endswith:
    - .exe
    - .vbs
    - .bat
    - .rar
    - .ps1
    - .dll
    - .zip
    - .sh
    - .tar.gz
    - .tar
    - .7z
    - .psm
    - .ps
    c-uri|re: ^(/[^/]*){0,2}\/(\w|\d)\.(exe|vbs|bat|zip|rar|ps1|dll|sh|tar\.gz|tar|7z|psm|ps)$
  filter:
  - cs-host|endswith:
    - .sharepoint.com
  condition: selection and not filter
falsepositives:
- Benign downloads
level: low
tags:
- attack.initial_access
